title: Devon's Datapack Resources
description: This 1.19+ Resource Pack hosts all the resources for my datapacks bundled into one neat package.
body:
This 1.21+ Resource Pack hosts all the resources for my datapacks bundled into one neat package.


Current datapacks that use this resource pack:

1) True Survival Mode
2) Drying Racks
3) Frost Tale
4) ﻿Immersive Beekeeping﻿
5) Ascension Lemons
